title: askellia flexuosa
intro: Askellia flexuosa, also known as the Cape daisy or Askellia, is a flowering plant species native to southern Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Askellia flexuosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
